text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, September 07. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Researching rover power systems in depth. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've noted the plans. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! I can help troubleshoot that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Healthy choices are great. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
